sql: SELECT id, name, email, status FROM users WHERE CASE WHEN #{type} = 'filtered' THEN (status = #{status} AND department = #{dept}) WHEN #{type} = 'ordered' THEN 1=1 ELSE 1=1 END
templateSql:
SELECT id, name, email, status FROM users
<choose>
    <when test="type == 'filtered'">
        <where>
            <if test="status != null">
                AND status = #{status}
            </if>
            <if test="dept != null">
                AND department = #{dept}
            </if>
        </where>
    </when>
    <when test="type == 'ordered'">
        <if test="sortField != null">
            ORDER BY ${sortField}
        </if>
    </when>
    <otherwise>
        WHERE 1=1
    </otherwise>
</choose>
